headline: Bill Ackman Is Taking His Firm Public. Why He’s Giving Away Free Shares.
summary: Bill Ackman is planning a novel way to take his investment management firm public in a deal expected to be offered late Tuesday.  Instead, Ackman will give shares of his management company, Pershing Square Inc., to buyers of his new equity-oriented, closed-end investment fund, Pershing Square USA, as a bonus for participating in the deal.  It’s a clever move by Ackman to sell a new fund, and lock up investment capital, which will enhance the value of the management company.

headline: Wall Street Thinks Private Credit Is Cracking: Goldman Says Buy The Selloff
summary: Jamie Dimon's cockroach warning triggered sharp selloffs in alternative managers. Goldman just published the inspection report — and the data doesn't match the panic.

headline: KKR Appoints Lauren Goodwin as Chief Investment Strategist for Global Wealth
summary: NEW YORK, April 28, 2026--Global investment firm KKR today announced the appointment of Lauren Goodwin as Managing Director and Chief Investment Strategist for the firm’s Global Wealth Solutions business. Ms. Goodwin, an experienced economist and portfolio strategist, will lead efforts to develop new practical tools for financial advisors and adapt KKR’s differentiated market insights for wirehouses, RIAs, private banks, and independent broker-dealers.
